When you mentioned the hearing accessibility feature, I literally screamed! As a deaf person, I never hear things like the tap, the doorbell, the cat at the door etc. so I’m incredibly intrigued to see how well this feature works, because if it’s good, it will literally change my life!                 ETA: For those wondering, I use subtitles along with my hearing implants to hear what is said in videos. And rely on lip reading and the implants in everyday life. Just because I use assistive technology, doesn’t mean I am not deaf, because without this technology I would struggle to hear an air horn next to my head, and even with it, I still rely partially on lip reading to understand what is being said.
